name: linkedin-linker
description: Automates LinkedIn connection requests with sequential processing and random delays

scripts.build: node scripts/set-build-target.js developer && tsc --noEmit && node scripts/build-dev.js
scripts.build:store: node scripts/set-build-target.js store && tsc -p tsconfig.store.json && node scripts/package-store.js
scripts.webstore:upload: npm run release && chrome-webstore-upload-cli upload --source release/store.zip --extension-id poedmlfffaldgihhpffkbknjegmkpclj
